metadata.description: FDE-os — the Forward Deployed Engineer toolkit, as an installable Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: fde-os
plugins.description: Offline, CI-gated agent skills for the FDE craft — discovery (delta-discovery-protocol, invisible-workflow-mapper), evaluation (true-scorer, criteria-scorer, rag-eval-harness, eval-loop), knowledge (knowledgefy, jd-compiler) — plus an MCP server exposing them as callable tools and a composition workflow (engagement-readiness).
